name: mojo-if-true-scope-fix
description: Documents how to replace Mojo 'if True:' constant condition anti-patterns with named helper functions for scope-based destructor testing. Use when: (1) Mojo --Werror reports constant condition warnings, (2) test files use 'if True:' to create inner scopes for refcount/destructor testing, (3) migrating memory leak tests to newer Mojo versions.
